name: HNMS Gouden Leeuw
events: 12 May 1940 HrMs Gouden Leeuw (?) departed Surabaya, Netherlands East Indies for Balikpapan, Netherlands East Indies. (1)
28 Jul 1940 HrMs Gouden Leeuw (?) departed Balikpapan, Netherlands East Indies for Tarakan, Netherlands East Indies. (1)
29 Jul 1940 HrMs Gouden Leeuw (?) arrived at Tarakan, Netherlands East Indies from Balikpapan, Netherlands East Indies. (1)
6 Sep 1940 HrMs Gouden Leeuw (?) departed Tarakan, Netherlands East Indies for Surabaya, Netherlands East Indies. (1)
9 Sep 1940 HrMs Gouden Leeuw (?) arrived at Surabaya, Netherlands East Indies from Tarakan, Netherlands East Indies. (1)
